name: @dominusnode/mcp-server
description: Rotating residential proxies for AI agents. Geo-targeting, crypto payments (BTC/ETH/LTC/XMR/ZEC/USDC/SOL/USDT/DAI/BNB/LINK), x402 micropayments, bootstrap mode (no API key needed), free tier (1GB).

DOMINUSNODE_API_KEY.description: API key (optional — omit for bootstrap mode)
